name: Mayne Pharma Group Limited
analysis: MYX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 63% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.3850, stop A$2.2374, target A$2.6400 (1.73:1) — then trail it.
